summary: Live Telemetry Dashboard testing complete. All features verified: 3/3 backend APIs passing (12 tests), 6/6 dashboard sections working, all navigation links functional. Auto-refresh and animated counters working correctly.

Backend_Status_APIs.GET /api/status/platform: PASS - Returns operational status with 6 metrics, 6 cities, 8 systems
Backend_Status_APIs.GET /api/status/events: PASS - Returns 20 anonymized events with types (anomaly/alert/system/resolved)
Backend_Status_APIs.GET /api/status/metrics: PASS - Returns network growth metrics (14 institutions, 342 guardians, 48720 sessions, 1847 incidents)
Backend_Status_APIs.Data structure verification: PASS - All required fields present with correct types
Backend_Status_APIs.Cities included: PASS - Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Pune, Dubai, London
Backend_Status_APIs.Systems included: PASS - 8 modules all operational with >99% uptime

Frontend_Telemetry_Page.Platform Status section: PASS - 6 metric cards (Active Sessions, Signals Today, AI Predictions, Alerts Triggered, Cities Monitored, Avg Response)
Frontend_Telemetry_Page.Animated counters: PASS - Count up from 0 to target values
Frontend_Telemetry_Page.Live Intelligence Feed: PASS - 20 events displayed with scrollable container
Frontend_Telemetry_Page.City Safety Heatmap: PASS - 6 city cards with risk levels and session counts
Frontend_Telemetry_Page.System Health section: PASS - 8 modules all showing 'operational' with uptime percentages
Frontend_Telemetry_Page.Network Growth section: PASS - 4 metrics (Institutions Protected, Active Guardians, Total Safety Sessions, Incidents Resolved)
Frontend_Telemetry_Page.Safety Network Map: PASS - 6 city nodes with pulsing animation
Frontend_Telemetry_Page.Auto-refresh indicator: PASS - Shows 'Last updated' timestamp and 'Auto-refreshes every 8s'
Frontend_Telemetry_Page.Footer: PASS - Home, Investors, Pilot Program, hello@Nagarik.app links

Design_Verification.Cyan/emerald accents: PASS - Teal-400/emerald-400 used for highlights and badges
Design_Verification.Pulsing animations: PASS - animate-ping used for status dots
Design_Verification.Color-coded events: PASS - Orange/red/cyan/emerald for different event types

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented (status-hero, status-overview, status-live-feed, etc.)
AnimatedCounter component working correctly with useEffect and setInterval
PulsingDot using Tailwind animate-ping for pulsing effect
API data fetching with Promise.all for parallel requests
8-second auto-refresh implemented with setInterval in useEffect
Event color mapping correctly handles all 4 types
Footer navigation uses onClick with useNavigate
seed_data_creation: None - APIs return simulated demo data (intentional design)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Telemetry dashboard complete at /telemetry. 3 public API endpoints: GET /api/status/platform (metrics, cities, systems), GET /api/status/events (20 anonymized events), GET /api/status/metrics (network growth). Frontend has 6 sections with animated counters and 8-second auto-refresh. Note: /status URL is intercepted by infrastructure, use /telemetry instead. All 3 backend status APIs return simulated demo data that varies slightly each call - this is intentional design for demo purposes.
